# Support of the Eagles

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **3** · Tactics

*Boon.*

---

Attach to a (Tactics) hero.
**Action:** Exhaust Support of the Eagles to choose an **_Eagle_** ally. Until the end of the phase, attached hero adds that ally's ATK or DEF (choose 1) to its own.
